_comment: User-created comparison funds. Open game — anyone can create / edit / delete via the Compare page UI; the server action in app/api/funds/ writes here through the GitHub Contents API (requires GITHUB_TOKEN env var on Vercel). Soft-delete via `deletedAt`; the Manage view's Archive tab lets the creator restore within 7 days. Validate locally: `python3 scripts/validate-funds.py`.
